description: Evaluates automation, orchestration, and integration maturity—vendor lock-in risk management and AI-powered security operations for proactive incident response and automated remediation.

capabilities.name: Vendor lock in
capabilities.description: The enterprise assesses vendor dependency across endpoints, devices, and applications and evaluates lock-in to justify or mitigate full dependency on a single vendor.
evaluation_focus: Dependency on a specific vendor for majority of endpoints, devices, or applications
Evaluation and justification or mitigation of vendor lock-in

capabilities.name: AiSecOPs
capabilities.description: The enterprise uses AI-powered techniques for timely proactive incident response, automated remediation, and frequent review of AI-driven responses for accuracy.
evaluation_focus: Timely proactive incident response using advanced techniques like AI
Frequent review of AI-powered responses and remediations for accuracy

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
